subject: [PATCH 03/19] nfsd: add missing read barrier to rpc_status_get dumpit seqcount retry

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a missing read barrier to the rpc_status_get_dumpit function in nfsd, ensuring that all data reads complete before re-checking the status counter on weakly-ordered architectures. Without this barrier, concurrent modifications by the writer could cause the retry logic to be ineffective. The patch matches the barrier semantics of the standard seqcount read-side.
